channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Saquon Barkley sets Eagles franchise record with 255 yards rushing, 2 TDs in a 37-20 win over Rams
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — When Saquon Barkley glanced up at a SoFi Stadium replay of his latest huge run for the Philadelphia Eagles on Sunday night, he happened to see a graphic indicating he had 173 yards rushing — only 16 shy of what he knew to be his career high.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Who's No. 1? No. 2 UConn, No. 5 UCLA and No. 6 Notre Dame all have chance at top spot in AP poll
item.description: A wild weekend in Los Angeles set up for a new No. 1 in The Associated Press women’s basketball poll when it’s released Monday.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Injured Joel Embiid, Paul George watch from the 76ers' bench once again
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — James Harden was about booed out of the arena each time he touched the ball, a sound of contempt not heard in Philly since — well, since Ben Simmons was razzed with much the same vocal voraciousness two nights earlier.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Short-handed 49ers stomped by Packers in 38-10 road loss
item.description: GREEN BAY, Wis. (AP) -- Josh Jacobs rushed for 106 yards and matched a career high with three touchdowns and the Green Bay Packers trounced the short-handed San Francisco 49ers 38-10 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Montrose Red Hawks advances to the next round
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — The Montrose Red Hawks delivered a commanding performance in the third round of the Class 4A playoffs, defeating Mesa Ridge 53-21 on Friday night to secure their spot in the semifinals.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: What the 49ers said after losing to the Packers
item.description: "They gave us an opportunity to get back in the game and then to have those three turnovers and all three led to touchdowns, 21 points," Kyle Shanahan said. "You top that with the penalties and stuff, that's how you get embarrassed like that.
item.dc:creator: Michael Nowels, The Mercury News

item.title: Josh Jacobs scores 3 touchdowns as Packers dominate injury-riddled 49ers
item.description: Green Bay Packers running back Josh Jacobs ran for three touchdowns for the first time in two years as the team barreled over the San Francisco 49ers, 38-10
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: No. 1 South Carolina experiences rare sting of defeat, seeing 43-game winning streak end
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Top-ranked South Carolina felt something it hasn't known in over 2 1/2 years. The sting of defeat after being thoroughly dominated in a 77-62 loss to No. 5 UCLA on Sunday. Gone was the overall 43-game winning streak. Done was the run of 33 consecutive road victories. And the No.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Sam Darnold leads game-winning drive in OT and Vikings beat Bears 30-27 after blowing late lead
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Sam Darnold figured the Vikings would recover the Bears' onside kick near the end of regulation and he would only need to kneel. Though things got a little more complicated, he'll take this result.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Malik Nabers tees off on 'soft as f---' Giants after embarrassing home loss
item.description: New York Giants rookie wide receiver Malik Nabers lambasted the team after a 30-7 loss at home to Baker Mayfield and the Tampa Bay Buccaneers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Patrick Mahomes and Chiefs win at the buzzer again, topping Panthers 30-27 on Shrader's field goal
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Ten yards into a scramble, Patrick Mahomes could have easily slid for a first down or simply ducked out of bounds and moved on to the next play.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Maverick McNealy birdies the last hole at Sea Island to finally become PGA Tour winner
item.description: ST. SIMONS ISLAND, Ga. (AP) — Maverick McNealy has learned in his five years on the PGA Tour that trying to win a tournament is “designed to make you feel as uncomfortable as you possibly can.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: No. 1 South Carolina women stunned by fifth-ranked UCLA 77-62, ending Gamecocks' 43-game win streak
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Londynn Jones scored 15 points, making all five of her 3-pointers, and fifth-ranked UCLA stunned No. 1 South Carolina 77-62 on Sunday, ending the Gamecocks’ overall 43-game winning streak and their run of 33 consecutive road victories.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jannik Sinner's 2024: 2 Slam Grand titles, a doping case and a Davis Cup title for Italy
item.description: MALAGA, Spain (AP) — Jannik Sinner was in the locker room, getting ready to go on court and try to win a match that would give Italy its second Davis Cup title in a row, when his teammate, Matteo Berrettini, was asked about being so close to a championship.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: When Harbaugh brothers meet for 3rd time Monday, Archie Manning can relate to Jack Harbaugh
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — Archie Manning can empathize with what Jack Harbaugh will be going through again on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Best of the West power rankings: Arizona State inches up, Boise State ticks down, Colorado slides and Oregon State reappears
item.description: The Sun Devils are the new No. 2 (behind Oregon) after beating BYU to move closer to the Big 12 championship game.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Bears vs. Vikings: What you need to know for Sunday's NFC North showdown at Soldier Field
item.description: CHICAGO — To paraphrase the famous words of then-Indianapolis Colts head coach Jim Mora, the Bears aren't really in a position to think playoffs right now. They're just hoping they can win a game.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Bay Area high school football 2024: Where to find our complete Week 13 coverage
item.description: Weekend highlights include wins by Los Gatos, De La Salle, St. Ignatius, San Ramon Valley, Wilcox, Bishop O'Dowd.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, The Mercury News

item.title: SJSU volleyball team with trans player clinches playoff meeting vs. team that forfeited amid controversy
item.description: San Jose State's volleyball team is currently guaranteed to face a team in the upcoming Mountain West Tournament that has already forfeited to it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Scotty Pippen Jr. scores career-high 30 points in Grizzlies' 142-131 win over Bulls
item.description: Scotty Pippen Jr. had a career-best 30 points with 10 assists to lead the Memphis Grizzlies past the Chicago Bulls 142-131 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Man City routed 4-0 by Tottenham in fifth-straight defeat as crisis deepens for Pep Guardiola
item.description: It started as an evening of celebration for Manchester City. It ended with the four-time defending Premier League champion conceding four goals and falling to a fifth-straight loss in all competitions as it faces a deepening crisis in a season that is threatening to unravel.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Markkanen scores 34 as Jazz beat Knicks, 121-106
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Lauri Markkanen had 34 points, Collin Sexton had four 3-pointers in the fourth quarter and the Utah Jazz ran past the New York Knicks 121-106 on Saturday to snap a four-game skid. Sexton finished 25 points and John Collins had 20 points and 13 rebounds forthe Jazz.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Purdy, Bosa out for Green Bay matchup, Allen steps up as QB
item.description: (KRON) – San Francisco 49ers head coach Kyle Shanahan announced in a press conference Friday that quarterback Brock Purdy will be out for Sunday’s game against the Green Bay Packers. Purdy injured his right shoulder in last Sunday's loss to the Seattle Seahawks.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: No ball at Tropicana Field in 2026 after Milton; new ballpark deal dies: Tampa Bay Rays
item.description: The St. Petersburg City Council has voted to spend over $23 million to repair Tropicana Field after Hurricane Milton destroyed the roof on the home of the Tampa Bay Rays.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz lose to Lakers, fall to 3-11 this season
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - While the Lakers' two all-stars LeBron James and Anthony Davis had their way with the Utah Jazz Tuesday night, it was L.A.'s rookie that did the most damage.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: USU seeks to overturn loss in forfeited volleyball game against San Jose State
item.description: Just hours after Utah lawmakers urged Utah State University to join a Title IX lawsuit against the Mountain West Conference, the Logan-based school filed a motion to join the lawsuit, in part.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Debris falls from roof at home of Cowboys before game against Texans
item.description: A piece of the roof at the home of the Dallas Cowboys fell to the field while the retractable portion of it was being opened at least three hours before a 34-10 loss to Houston on Monday night, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Column: Once Eberflus is gone, it's time to find a true culture setter
item.description: The Chicago Bears have lost three games in a row despite having a positive turnover margin, and need a head coach who can galvanize his roster to eat a punch early and rise to the occasion when the game is on the line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
